title: Poka-Yoke ROI Calculator
description: Calculates the return on investment for implementing a poka-yoke (mistake-proofing) device or process, based on defect reduction, quality cost savings, and implementation expenses.

inputs.label: Annual Units Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced per year for the process line where the poka-yoke will be applied.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced per year for the process line where the poka-yoke will be applied.

inputs.label: Current Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Current defect rate in parts per million (ppm) for the process step targeted by the poka-yoke.

businessContext_i18n.en: Current defect rate in parts per million (ppm) for the process step targeted by the poka-yoke.

inputs.label: Defect Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Average total cost incurred per defective unit, including scrap, rework, warranty, and lost customer goodwill.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average total cost incurred per defective unit, including scrap, rework, warranty, and lost customer goodwill.

inputs.label: Poka-Yoke Effectiveness
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage of defects that will be prevented by the poka-yoke device or process.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage of defects that will be prevented by the poka-yoke device or process.

inputs.label: Implementation Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total one-time cost to design, purchase, install, and validate the poka-yoke solution.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total one-time cost to design, purchase, install, and validate the poka-yoke solution.

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost
inputs.businessContext: Recurring yearly cost for calibration, spare parts, and upkeep of the poka-yoke system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Recurring yearly cost for calibration, spare parts, and upkeep of the poka-yoke system.

inputs.label: Labor Hours Saved per Year
inputs.businessContext: Estimated reduction in inspection and rework labor hours per year due to the poka-yoke.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated reduction in inspection and rework labor hours per year due to the poka-yoke.

inputs.label: Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened hourly labor cost for operators and inspectors.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully burdened hourly labor cost for operators and inspectors.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual discount rate used for net present value (NPV) calculation, reflecting the cost of capital.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual discount rate used for net present value (NPV) calculation, reflecting the cost of capital.

inputs.label: Project Life (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected useful life of the poka-yoke solution before major redesign or replacement.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected useful life of the poka-yoke solution before major redesign or replacement.

rules.message: Defect rate must be between 10 and 100,000 ppm.
Poka-yoke effectiveness must be between 80% and 99%.
Implementation cost must be greater than zero.
Project life must be at least 1 year.

thresholds.message: The calculated ROI is negative. Consider re-evaluating the implementation cost or expected defect reduction.
Exceptional ROI! The poka-yoke investment is highly justified.
Current defect rate is very high (>10,000 ppm). Immediate action recommended.

formulas.label: Defects Prevented per Year
formulas.description: Number of defects eliminated annually by the poka-yoke.

formulas.label: Annual Defect Cost Savings
formulas.description: Total cost savings from reduced defects.

formulas.label: Annual Labor Savings
formulas.description: Cost savings from reduced inspection and rework labor.

formulas.label: Total Annual Benefit
formulas.description: Sum of all annual cost savings from the poka-yoke.

formulas.label: Net Annual Cash Flow
formulas.description: Annual benefit minus annual maintenance cost.

formulas.label: Net Present Value (NPV)
formulas.description: Present value of net cash flows over the project life, minus initial investment.

formulas.label: Return on Investment (ROI)
formulas.description: Primary result: ROI as a percentage over the project life.

primary.label: Return on Investment (ROI)
primary.description: Primary ROI percentage over the project life.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Hidden Defect Escalation Cost
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cost of defects that escape to downstream processes or customers, not captured in defect_cost_per_unit.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Hidden Quality Administration Overhead
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Indirect costs for quality reporting, meetings, and corrective actions that may persist.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Hidden Opportunity Cost of Downtime
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Lost production capacity due to defect-related stoppages not fully eliminated.

suggestedActions.description: Implement poka-yoke with highest effectiveness (99%) to maximize defect reduction.
suggestedActions.expected_impact: Increase ROI by up to 15% compared to 95% effectiveness.

suggestedActions.description: Conduct a detailed cost-of-quality study to refine defect_cost_per_unit and capture hidden costs.
suggestedActions.expected_impact: Improve accuracy of ROI calculation and identify additional savings.

suggestedActions.description: Integrate poka-yoke with real-time monitoring and SPC to sustain gains and detect drift.
suggestedActions.expected_impact: Extend project life and reduce maintenance costs by 10-20%.

suggestedActions.description: Train operators on poka-yoke principles to foster continuous improvement culture.
suggestedActions.expected_impact: Reduce implementation resistance and increase effectiveness.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted ROI
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: ROI adjusted downward by 10% to account for typical uncertainty in input estimates.
